en.extract:
The mountain scops owl (Otus spilocephalus), sometimes referred to as the spotted scops owl, is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. Its range extends across much of south and southeast Asia, from Pakistan and the Himalayas in the northwest, through Taiwan, Thailand and Malaysia in the east and south.
The nominate subspecies of the eastern Himalayas has a distinct more russet plumage.
It is an altitudinal migrant.
The owls have a short high-pitched call like a two-note whistle, "plew-plew" or "he-he", although the female's songs are rarely heard. Their calls also differ between geographic population.


References

BirdLife Species Factsheet
http://www.owlpages.com/owls.php?genus=Otus&species=spilocephalus


External links
"Otus spilocephalus media". Internet Bird Collection.

The '''mountain scops owl''' ('''''Otus spilocephalus'''''), sometimes referred to as the spotted scops owl, is a species of [[owl]] in the family [[Strigidae]]. Its range extends across much of south and southeast Asia, from Pakistan and the Himalayas in the northwest, through Taiwan, Thailand and Malaysia in the east and south.<ref name="iucn status"/>

The nominate subspecies of the eastern Himalayas has a distinct more russet plumage.

It is an [[Altitudinal migration|altitudinal migrant]].{{Citation needed|date=March 2026|reason=Previous citation did not mention the owl at all.}}

The owls have a short high-pitched [[bird song|call]] like a two-note whistle, "plew-plew" or "he-he", although the female's songs are rarely heard. Their calls also differ between geographic population.<ref>{{Cite journal |last=Marshall |first=Joe T. |date=1978 |title=Systematics of Smaller Asian Night Birds Based on Voice |url=https://digitalcommons.usf.edu/ornithological_monographs/16/ |journal=Ornithological Monographs |volume=16 |pages=6}}</ref><ref>{{Cite journal |last=Roberts |first=Tom J. |last2=King |first2=Ben |date=1986 |title=Vocalizations of the owls of the genus ''Otus'' in Pakistan |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/3676817 |journal=Ornis Scandinavica |volume=17 |pages=299-305 |doi=10.2307/3676817|url-access=subscription }}</ref>

[[File:Mountain Scops-Owl 0A2A0508.jpg|thumb|left]]
[[File:Mountain scops owl juv.jpg|thumb|left|A juvenile mountain scops owl photographed at [[Sattal]], [[India]]]]

zh.extract:
黄嘴角鸮（学名：Otus spilocephalus）为鸱鸮科角鸮属的鸟类。分布于印度、尼泊尔、孟加拉、缅甸、越南、老挝、泰国、马来西亚、印度尼西亚、台灣以及中国的福建、广东、海南、广西等地，主要生活于海拔1000-3000米的高山常绿林中。该物种的模式产地在印度大吉岭。


保护
中国国家重点保护动物等级：二级


亚种
黄嘴角鸮包括以下亚种

黄嘴角鸮臺灣亚种（学名：Otus spilocephalus hambroecki Swinhoe, 1870），臺灣特有物種，多见于800米以下的低海拔树林。
（学名：Otus spilocephalus huttoni Hume, 1870）
黄嘴角鸮华南亚种（学名：Otus spilocephalus latouchei Rickett, 1900）。分布于中南半岛以及中国大陆的福建、广东、广西等地。该物种的模式产地在福建。
（学名：Otus spilocephalus luciae Sharpe, 1888）
（学名：Otus spilocephalus siamensis Robinson & Kloss, 1922）
黄嘴角鸮指名亚种（学名：Otus spilocephalus spilocephalus Blyth, 1846）
（学名：Otus spilocephalus vandewateri Robinson & Kloss, 1916）
（学名：Otus spilocephalus vulpes Ogilvie-Grant, 1906）
